THE MOVING PARTY REQUESTED TO TAKE THEIR MOTION OFF CALENDAR BY EMAIL ON 9/28/23 AND FOLLOWED UP THEIR REQUEST ON 12/1/23 AFTER JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD'S TENTATIVE RULING WAS POSTED. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-17-2024 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-08-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via ZOOM
Benjamin T. Ikuta, Esq. IKUTA HEMESATH LLP, (949) 229-5654, Service@ih-llp.com Attorneys for Plaintiffs MARY KATHLEEN HILL, Individually and as Successor-In-Interest for FRANKLIN P. HILL

Not ARGUED. Not Contested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MARY HILL'S Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for leave to file a first amended complaint" is granted. A proposed amended complaint's validity is not considered when deciding leave to amend. (See Kittredge Sports Co. v. Sup. Ct. (1989) 213 Cal.App.3d 1045, 1048.)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

Motion For Compelling Plaintiffs Response To Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Dec-04-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court vacates is tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS VIBRA HEALTHCARE, LLC DBA KENTFIELD HOSPITAL'S Motion For Compelling Plaintiffs Response To Form Interrogatories is taken off calender per request of the moving party. The moving party requested to take their motion off calendar by email on 9/28/23 and followed up thier request on 12/1/23 after Judge Pro Tem David McDonald's tenataive ruling was posted. Judge Pro Tem McDonald vacates its tentative ruling and takes the motion off calendar pursuant to the moving party's request.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
